description: Breathing Apparatus, Life Support, Species Support, 2 kg weight, 2000 credits. A sealed breathing apparatus for species that cannot tolerate standard atmospheres. Special: Commonly required by Gand and similar species when away from their native atmosphere.

name: Transliterator
description: Transliterator, Communication, Species Support, 0.1 kg weight, 100 credits. A small translator/vocoder unit that allows species with limited vocal ranges to communicate in other languages. Special: Gand commonly require a transliterator to speak languages other than Gand.

name: Ultraviolet Visor
description: Ultraviolet Visor, Life Support, Species Support, 0.5 kg weight, 2000 credits. A specialized visor that lets Defel see in normal light. Special: Defel outside Af'El generally need this visor to avoid blindness in ordinary light.

name: Celegian Life-Support Chamber
description: Celegian Life-Support Chamber, Life Support, Species Support, 15 kg weight, 2000 credits. A sealed life-support chamber that maintains the cyanogen-rich atmosphere required by Celegians. Special: Celegians suffocate without an appropriate life-support chamber when exposed to oxygen atmospheres.

name: Ubese Environmental Suit
description: Ubese Environmental Suit, Life Support, Species Support, Armor, 6 kg weight, 2000 credits. An environmental suit with breath mask and voice modulator used by Ubese away from their homeworld. Special: Functions like a protective environmental suit and includes a voice modulator; the GM adjudicates atmosphere and hazard protection.
